title: Sweet and Silky Saudi-Arabian Peppers Broil
description: A malty and silky one-pot dish featuring sweet red peppers, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. This recipe is nut-free and free from any hassle of multiple pots.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced red peppers to the skillet, followed by sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Stir everything together, then place the skillet under the broiler for 10-15 minutes, or until the peppers are tender and slightly caramelized.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley, if using.
Serve the sweet and silky peppers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
